engines.name: narsil
engines.keyword_setup: BM25 k1=0.9 b=0.4; Narsil english analyzer (Porter stemmer, 70-word stop list)

engines.name: elasticsearch
engines.keyword_setup: BM25 k1=0.9 b=0.4 (custom default similarity); Elasticsearch `english` analyzer (Porter stemmer, English stop words)

engines.name: opensearch
engines.keyword_setup: BM25 k1=0.9 b=0.4 (custom default similarity, native Lucene BM25Similarity in 3.x); OpenSearch `english` analyzer (Porter stemmer, English stop words)

rows.server_time_disclosure: response `elapsed` field (floating-millisecond resolution)
rows.setup: HNSW over the shared precomputed vectors, SQ8 scalar quantization with full-precision rerank, cosine

rows.server_time_disclosure: response `took` field (integer-millisecond resolution; sub-millisecond searches floor to 0-1 ms)
rows.setup: dense_vector BBQ (bbq_hnsw, binary quantization) with full-precision rescore (oversample tuned to the recall target), similarity cosine

rows.server_time_disclosure: response `took` field (integer-millisecond resolution; sub-millisecond searches floor to 0-1 ms)
rows.setup: knn_vector HNSW (faiss engine, 16-bit SQ / SQfp16 scalar quantization, inner product on L2-normalized vectors = cosine), over the shared precomputed vectors

rows.server_time_disclosure: top-level `time` field (seconds, converted to ms) (floating-millisecond resolution)
rows.setup: HNSW dense vectors with int8 scalar quantization and full-precision rescore (oversampling 2.0x), distance Cosine, over the shared precomputed vectors

rows.server_time_disclosure: client round-trip only (no server-side query time exposed)
rows.setup: HNSW dense vectors with 8-bit Rotational Quantization and full-precision rescore, distance cosine, over the shared precomputed vectors

rows.server_time_disclosure: response `elapsed` field (floating-millisecond resolution)
rows.setup: BM25 (text) fused with SQ8-quantized HNSW vector search (full-precision rerank) via Reciprocal Rank Fusion

rows.server_time_disclosure: response `took` field (integer-millisecond resolution; sub-millisecond searches floor to 0-1 ms)
rows.setup: BM25 match fused with BBQ dense_vector kNN (full-precision rescore) via the RRF retriever

rows.server_time_disclosure: response `took` field (integer-millisecond resolution; sub-millisecond searches floor to 0-1 ms)
rows.setup: BM25 match fused with SQfp16-quantized knn via a hybrid query and an RRF search pipeline

rows.server_time_disclosure: top-level `time` field (seconds, converted to ms) (floating-millisecond resolution)
rows.setup: int8-quantized dense HNSW (full-precision rescore) fused with BM25 sparse vectors (fastembed Qdrant/bm25, server IDF) via RRF

rows.server_time_disclosure: client round-trip only (no server-side query time exposed)
rows.setup: BM25 over text fused with RQ-quantized dense vectors (full-precision rescore) via the hybrid operator (rankedFusion, alpha=0.5)
